task_completion.description: Open the flattened IFC model in the BIM software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender/Bonsai interface is visible with the 'fzk_flat.ifc' model loaded, showing a flat spatial structure in the outliner or spatial manager.

task_completion.description: Create an IfcBuildingStorey for the Ground Floor at elevation 0.0m.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The outliner or spatial manager shows a new IfcBuildingStorey named 'Ground Floor' (or similar) nested under the IfcBuilding, with its elevation property set to 0.0m.

task_completion.description: Create an IfcBuildingStorey for the First Floor at elevation 2.8m.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The outliner or spatial manager shows a new IfcBuildingStorey named 'First Floor' (or similar) nested under the IfcBuilding, with its elevation property set to 2.8m.

task_completion.description: Reassign lower-level elements (Z < 2.5m) to the Ground Floor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The outliner shows multiple geometric elements (walls, slabs, doors, windows) correctly nested under the 'Ground Floor' IfcBuildingStorey.

task_completion.description: Reassign upper-level elements (Z >= 2.5m) to the First Floor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The outliner shows multiple geometric elements correctly nested under the 'First Floor' IfcBuildingStorey.

task_completion.description: Ensure the IfcBuilding root contains no direct geometric elements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The outliner shows that the IfcBuilding entity only contains the two IfcBuildingStorey entities, with no walls, slabs, or other geometric elements directly attached to it.

task_completion.description: Save the repaired model to the specified output path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file browser, or notification confirming the file is being saved to '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_repaired.ifc'.

integrity.description: The agent used the BIM software GUI (Blender/Bonsai) to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Blender's outliner, spatial manager, and properties panels rather than just running a Python script in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent modified actual IFC spatial structures, not just Blender collections.
integrity.visual_evidence: The outliner displays IFC-specific icons and naming conventions (e.g., IfcProject, IfcSite, IfcBuilding, IfcBuildingStorey) rather than standard Blender collections.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to manually edit the raw IFC file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen working within a 3D BIM environment, not manipulating STEP/IFC text lines in a text editor like nano, vim, or gedit.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The corrupted model is located at '/home/ga/IFCModels/fzk_flat.ifc'. The agent must create two storeys: 'Ground Floor' (Elevation 0.0m) and 'First Floor' (Elevation 2.8m). The FZK-Haus model contains 96 geometric elements in total. Elements with Z < 2.5m (38 elements) must be assigned to the Ground Floor, and elements with Z >= 2.5m (58 elements) must be assigned to the First Floor. The final repaired model must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_repaired.ifc'.
